stories.headline: Kuwait desalination plant, oil refinery hit by missile and drone strikes
stories.description: Elsewhere, Oracle and Amazon Web Services data centres were targeted in the UAE, reports said.

stories.headline: Major London Euston rail disruption due across Easter weekend
stories.description: West Coast Main Line services will not run to London Euston station for six days from Good Friday.

stories.headline: Why did Trump fire Pam Bondi from Justice Department, who is Todd Blanche?
stories.description: Pam Bondi was fired by Trump, with the president saying she would be ‘transitioning’ to a new role in the private sector

stories.headline: Bahrain cracks down as Iran war reignites protests
stories.description: Bahrain cracks down after Iran's missile attack, raising concerns about detainee treatment.

stories.headline: Iran condemns US-Israeli ‘moral collapse’ after attacks on civilian sites
stories.description: Strikes damage or destroy Iran’s tallest bridge and a century-old medical research centre fighting diseases.
